form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after three months finished third in a small field at Southwell on March 24 over 3200m, 24 len behind Shadowfax Of Rohan carrying 76kg at $6. Previously second-up came from midfield; finished third in a small field at Fakenham on October 17 over 4200m, 23 len behind Enjoy D'allen with 71kg at $5.50. Expected to run well again if performs up latest effort.

form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Resumes off a 30 day letup. Last start finished fourth of 7 starters at this track on March 15 over 3400m, 6 len behind Icare Colombe carrying 75.5kg at $4. Before that finished fourth of 7 runners at this track on February 1 over 3800m, on slow going 10 len behind Florita carrying 75kg at $3.30. Only needs to jump well to be right in the finish.
